author: doll-agent
content: Implemented PCG64DXSM BitGenerator in ferray-random::bitgen::pcg64dxsm. 128-bit LCG with cheap-multiplier (0xda94204264dd58b5) and DXSM (double-xorshift-multiply) output function — Melissa O'Neill's 2022 recommended replacement for the classic XSL-RR PCG64. Period 2^128. Re-exported as ferray_random::Pcg64Dxsm. 3 unit tests.
